task_objective: Modify pyludusavi package to log environment variables at load time.
design_decisions: Added logging to pyludusavi/__init__.py to ensure it runs when the package is loaded.
Logged os.environ at INFO level as requested.
Used dict(os.environ) to ensure it's serializable if needed and clearly presented in logs.
results: Package now logs environment variables on load. Verified with new test case and passed all existing tests.
